little-rock.neighborhoods: Downtown, Hillcrest, River Market, The Heights, Woodland Hills, Chenal
little-rock.meetingHighlights: Robust downtown and neighborhood meetings with active River Market groups and regular speaker meetings.
little-rock.transitInfo: CARTS and Rock Region Metro provide local transit; Clinton National Airport (LIT) serves the metro.

fort-smith.areaDescription: Fort Smith metropolitan area, Arkansas River Valley
fort-smith.neighborhoods: Downtown Fort Smith, Chaffee Crossing, Northside, Rogers Avenue corridor
fort-smith.meetingHighlights: Border-city recovery with meetings serving Arkansas and Oklahoma; strong Big Book tradition; active evening meetings.
fort-smith.transitInfo: Fort Smith Transit provides local bus service; Fort Smith Regional Airport (FSM); close to I-40 and I-540.

fayetteville.neighborhoods: Downtown Fayetteville, Dickson Street, University of Arkansas area, Wilson Park
fayetteville.meetingHighlights: College-town recovery community with young people's meetings; diverse schedule near U of A campus; growing metro area.
fayetteville.transitInfo: Ozark Regional Transit buses; Northwest Arkansas Regional Airport (XNA) serves the region.

jonesboro.neighborhoods: Downtown Jonesboro, Highland Park, Stadium Boulevard, Johnson Avenue
jonesboro.meetingHighlights: Regional hub for recovery in Northeast Arkansas; college-area meetings near A-State; welcoming community atmosphere.
jonesboro.transitInfo: Limited local transit; Jonesboro Municipal Airport (JBR); US Highway 49 and 63 access.

hot-springs.areaDescription: Hot Springs and Garland County area in the Ouachita Mountains
hot-springs.neighborhoods: Downtown Hot Springs, Bathhouse Row, Park Avenue, Lake Hamilton, Fountain Lake
hot-springs.meetingHighlights: Recovery community centered around downtown and the national park area; meetings at churches near Central Avenue and Bathhouse Row; strong tradition of speaker and step-study groups serving locals and visitors alike.
hot-springs.transitInfo: Hot Springs Intracity Transit (IntraCITY) bus service; Memorial Field Airport (HOT); US-70 and Highway 7 provide regional access; about 55 miles west of Little Rock via I-30.

rogers.areaDescription: Rogers and Bentonville area in Northwest Arkansas
rogers.neighborhoods: Downtown Rogers, Pinnacle Hills, Pleasant Crossing, Blossom Way, Bentonville adjacent areas
rogers.meetingHighlights: Fast-growing Northwest Arkansas recovery community with meetings in Rogers and neighboring Bentonville; evening and lunchtime groups popular with corporate professionals; welcoming newcomer meetings.
rogers.transitInfo: Ozark Regional Transit provides bus service; Northwest Arkansas Regional Airport (XNA) is nearby; Interstate 49 and US-71 access.

conway.areaDescription: College city northwest of Little Rock in central Arkansas
conway.neighborhoods: Downtown, Hendrix area, UCA district, Prince Street corridor, Salem Road area, Centennial Valley
conway.meetingHighlights: Meetings benefit from the city's college presence and serve Faulkner County with regular weeknight options.
conway.transitInfo: Conway Corporation buses provide limited local transit; I-40 is the main regional connection.

north-little-rock.areaDescription: City across the Arkansas River from Little Rock
north-little-rock.neighborhoods: Argenta, Park Hill, Lakewood, Levy, Rose City, McCain corridor
north-little-rock.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve central Arkansas neighborhoods on the north side of the river with solid evening coverage.
north-little-rock.transitInfo: Rock Region Metro bus routes and the streetcar link North Little Rock with downtown Little Rock.

bentonville.areaDescription: Northwest Arkansas regional hub in Benton County
bentonville.neighborhoods: Downtown Square, Crystal Bridges area, Bella Vista vicinity, Walton Boulevard corridor, South Walton, Northeast Bentonville
bentonville.meetingHighlights: Meetings reflect the rapid growth of Northwest Arkansas and draw attendees from across the Bentonville-Rogers area.
bentonville.transitInfo: Ozark Regional Transit serves parts of the area; Northwest Arkansas National Airport is nearby in Highfill.
